emails.subject: David Marshall
emails.body: Could you PLEASE PLEASE call David Marshall and get his email? I'm on endless conference calls and need to contact him about a matter. Thanks, Kay PS, not a vacation day

emails.subject: Re: David Marshall
emails.body: Re: David Marshall Will do! I KNOW it's not a vacation day my dear! Jacoby has called me I don't know how many times asking for your numbers. I need a drink! It's been one busy day for me too! Kay Mann@ENRON 06/07/2001 02:33 PM

emails.body: I don't know if I'll be able to go. Girl, I'm so tired now and have so much to do for the trip (haven't done anything). emails.subject: Re: David Marshall
emails.body: Is today Paige's birthday or tomorrow. Of course if it was great news, then it could be a celebratory drink. I told Ric I may come by for a drink, but I didn't know yet. I think I'll call and get exact directions. Do you need this fax I got from King and Spalding with comments on Midway? Kay Mann@ENRON 06/07/2001 02:43 PM

emails.subject: Re: David Marshall
emails.body: Plse have fax delivered home. Today is the day. I have been a mom for 21 years. Can't be true. Still on conference call. Ben has been very nice. From: Suzanne Adams@ECT on 06/07/2001 02:46 PM

emails.subject: Re: David Marshall
emails.body: The fax is being couriered to your home. 21 years, I can't believe it! Ben has been very nice to me too, and I've been nice to him! Oh, you should have seen Dan today. He had a closing so he wore a shirt and bow tie. I took a picture. Kay Mann@ENRON 06/07/2001 03:15 PM
